creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
According to 

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/devel.html#gvd

the port devel/gvd has an unfetchable distfile.  There is a newer version of
gvd.  I don't use this so I made no attempt to upgrade the port, but the diff
below makes the port fetchable again.

NOTE : I've CC'd the MAINTAINER with this PR.
